text: Your task: in a single tick, issue THREE parallel `call_tool` decisions to the MCP tool `get-sum` (call them as three separate `tool_use` blocks in one response, not sequentially across ticks). Use these three arg pairs: {"a": 1, "b": 1}, {"a": 2, "b": 2}, {"a": 3, "b": 3}. The runtime will dispatch all three in parallel and store one evidence record per call. After the three results arrive, on the next tick emit an Output via the `emit_output` decision whose `content` summarizes the three sums ("2, 4, 6") and whose `evidence` array cites all three evidence ids. Then retire. Do not call any other tool; do not loop; do not idle. The whole run must complete in 3 ticks or fewer (1 for the parallel batch, 1 for emit, 1 for retire).
